summary: Iteration 38: Auth/Signin flow testing. Backend: 17/17 tests PASSED (send-otp, verify-otp-register new user, magic-link login, wrong OTP, standard login, /auth/me). Two CRITICAL frontend bugs found through code review + browser testing: (1) loginWithToken race condition causes dashboard redirect to /login, (2) AuthCallback never calls loginWithToken/setToken after Google OAuth. Register page loads fine, Login page loads fine, both Google buttons verified. One session email input Playwright limitation encountered.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL BUG: After OTP verify, Register.js calls `loginWithToken(token)` then immediately `navigate('/dashboard')`. loginWithToken sets `setToken` but does NOT set `setLoading(true)`. PrivateRoute sees user=null, loading=false → redirects to /login instead of /dashboard. User ends up at /login (then possibly /match-centre after fetchUser completes). Confirmed via browser test: client-side navigate('/dashboard') goes to /login.
integration_issues.rca: AuthContext loginWithToken (AuthContext.js:57-61) calls setToken but not setLoading(true). fetchUser() is triggered by useEffect([token]) ASYNCHRONOUSLY. When navigate('/dashboard') runs immediately after loginWithToken returns, PrivateRoute checks user (null) and loading (false) → redirects to /login. Fix: add setLoading(true) inside loginWithToken before setToken call.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL BUG: AuthCallback (App.js:58-96) imports `login as ctxLogin` but NEVER calls it. After Google OAuth, it only calls `localStorage.setItem('token', data.token)` (line 77) WITHOUT calling setToken/loginWithToken. Since setToken is never called, AuthContext's token state stays null, useEffect([token]) never fires, fetchUser never runs, user state is never set. navigate('/dashboard') fails → user bounced to /login. Without a page refresh, user cannot proceed.
integration_issues.rca: App.js AuthCallback should call loginWithToken(data.token) instead of localStorage.setItem. Fix: replace lines 77-78 with `await loginWithToken(data.token)` (after destructuring loginWithToken from useAuth() in line 60).

test_results.backend_api_verify_otp_register_new_user: PASS — New email: creates account, returns {access_token, token_type:'bearer', user} with correct structure
test_results.backend_api_verify_otp_register_existing: PASS — Existing user magic-link login returns access_token correctly
test_results.backend_api_verify_otp_register_wrong_ot: PASS — Wrong OTP returns 400 with detail message
test_results.backend_api_login: PASS — POST /api/auth/login works for existing user
test_results.register_page_loads: PASS — /register loads without blank white screen, 'Join FREE11' heading visible
test_results.login_page_loads: PASS — /login loads without blank white screen, 'SIGN IN' heading visible
test_results.login_standard_flow: PASS (backend) — POST /api/auth/login confirmed working, token authenticates /auth/me
test_results.dashboard_loads_with_token: PASS — Full page navigation to /dashboard with valid localStorage token loads dashboard correctly
test_results.authcontext_loginWithToken_exists: PASS — AuthContext.js:57 — loginWithToken(token) method exists and sets localStorage + setToken
test_results.register_otp_stage_transition: NOT TESTED — React controlled email input could not be filled via Playwright (all methods: fill, type, press_sequentially, nativeDispatch all returned '' for email_val in this env)
test_results.navigate_dashboard_after_loginWithToken: FAIL — Client-side navigate('/dashboard') after token injection goes to /login (race condition)

action_items: CRITICAL FIX #1 — AuthContext.js loginWithToken: Add `setLoading(true)` before `setToken(token)` call. This ensures PrivateRoute shows a spinner (not redirect to /login) while fetchUser completes. Without this, OTP registration redirects to /login instead of /dashboard.

CRITICAL FIX #2 — App.js AuthCallback (line 60 & 77): (a) Change `const { login: ctxLogin } = useAuth()` to `const { loginWithToken } = useAuth()`. (b) Replace `localStorage.setItem('token', data.token); localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(data.user));` with `await loginWithToken(data.token)`. Without this, Google OAuth flow sets localStorage but never updates AuthContext state — user is permanently stuck at /login after Google OAuth (until manual page refresh).
OPTIONAL FIX — App.js AuthCallback also stores user in localStorage (line 78) but AuthContext doesn't read user from localStorage. This is harmless but inconsistent — should be removed after fix #2.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: loginWithToken race condition — AuthContext.js:57-61 — loginWithToken does not set setLoading(true). When called from Register.js verifyAndJoin, navigate('/dashboard') runs immediately after, but user is not yet set → PrivateRoute redirects to /login. Fix: add setLoading(true) inside loginWithToken. This was the root cause of the original 'blank white page on sign-in' that may still manifest as unexpected /login redirect.

CRITICAL: AuthCallback bug — App.js:58-96 — After Google OAuth, only sets localStorage directly without calling loginWithToken/setToken. AuthContext never learns about the new token. User ends up in /login and cannot proceed without a manual page refresh. The ctxLogin variable is imported (line 60) but never called.

GOOD: /api/auth/verify-otp-register endpoint (server.py:546-611) correctly handles both new user creation and existing user magic-link login. Response structure {access_token, token_type, user} is correct. Sensitive fields (_id, password_hash) correctly excluded.
GOOD: Register.js now correctly uses loginWithToken (line 89) and not the old login(token, user) signature.
GOOD: Google OAuth URL in both Register.js (line 125) and Login.js (line 252) correctly points to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...

NOTE: Playwright automated testing limitation — email input (type='email', React controlled) could not be filled via any Playwright method (fill/type/press_sequentially/nativeDispatch) in this test environment. This is a known React 18 + Playwright headless issue. Backend tests (pytest) fully validated all OTP flows. Dashboard loads correctly with token injection.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (page loads pass, Google buttons pass, dashboard loads pass; 2 critical integration bugs found)

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed OTP test records in otp_codes collection (auto-cleanup after 10 min expiry). No permanent test users created beyond what already existed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two critical bugs need fixing before retesting: (1) AuthContext.js loginWithToken needs setLoading(true) — test: register with OTP, verify '/dashboard' URL after navigate (not '/login'). (2) App.js AuthCallback needs to call loginWithToken(data.token) instead of localStorage.setItem — test: simulate Google OAuth callback and verify dashboard loads. Backend: 17/17 auth tests all pass in /app/backend/tests/test_auth_signin_flow.py. Register/Login pages load correctly. Google buttons exist and have correct URLs. Dashboard loads with valid token via full page navigation. Playwright fill issue with email inputs — use React nativeInputValueSetter trick or test via backend API.

OTP_registration_redirect_bug.root_cause: AuthContext.loginWithToken (AuthContext.js:57-61) sets token via setToken() which triggers fetchUser() asynchronously via useEffect. But loading state is NOT reset to true. When Register.js calls navigate('/dashboard') after loginWithToken returns, PrivateRoute evaluates: user=null (not yet fetched), loading=false → redirects to /login.
OTP_registration_redirect_bug.reproduction: 1. Go to /register, fill email, send OTP. 2. Enter valid OTP, click Verify & Join. 3. Observe redirect to /login instead of /dashboard.
OTP_registration_redirect_bug.fix: In AuthContext.js loginWithToken, add setLoading(true) before setToken. This makes PrivateRoute show a loading spinner while fetchUser() completes, then properly renders the dashboard when user is set.

Google_OAuth_AuthCallback_bug.root_cause: App.js AuthCallback (line 77-78) calls localStorage.setItem('token', data.token) directly instead of calling loginWithToken(data.token). Since setToken is never called, AuthContext's token state remains null, useEffect([token]) never fires, fetchUser never runs, user is never set in React state. Client-side navigate('/dashboard') hits PrivateRoute with user=null → redirect to /login.
Google_OAuth_AuthCallback_bug.reproduction: 1. Click 'Continue with Google' on /register or /login. 2. Complete Google auth. 3. App returns to /dashboard route but redirects to /login.
Google_OAuth_AuthCallback_bug.fix: In App.js AuthCallback: change `const { login: ctxLogin } = useAuth()` to `const { loginWithToken } = useAuth()`. Replace lines 77-78 with `await loginWithToken(data.token)`.
